name: weekly-commit-report
description: Every Monday: fetch an employee's GitHub commits for the past 7 days and produce a structured contribution report with themes, stats, and highlights. Optionally pushes to phone via ntfy.sh.
author: Oolab Labs

REPORT_REPO.description: GitHub repository to report on (owner/repo format)

NTFY_TOPIC.description: ntfy.sh topic for phone push notification — leave blank to skip
